title: UFO documentary director says US is at a 'turning point' for extraterrestrial exploration
description: UFO documentary director says the truth is finally coming out about extraterrestrial life and UAPs.

title: Are Aliens Real? Trump Says 'Very Interesting' UFO Files To Be Released Soon
description: US President Donald Trump announced that the Department of Defence will soon release very interesting documents related to UFOs and UAPs While former President Obama also commented on potential life experts caution that definitive proof of alien life remains unlikely despite the upcoming disclosures

title: Sky Secrets Or Smoke Screen? Trump’s UFO Tease Sparks Epstein Distraction Row
description: Sky Secrets Or Smoke Screen? Trump’s UFO Tease Sparks Epstein Distraction Row

title: UFO Scientist Deaths Explained: How 11 US Experts Went Missing, What Trump, FBI Probe Reveal About Chilling Pattern
description: The mysterious deaths and disappearances of 11 US scientists have triggered alarm in Washington. Republican Congressman Eric Burlison has called it a matter of “urgent national importance.” With links to UFO and defence research, fears of foreign involvement are now under scrutiny.

title: Pentagon To Soon Release 'Very Interesting' UFO Files: Trump
description: Trump said the review process is already underway and has uncovered material he described as “very interesting.”
